193	                         symengine                                        \

195	                         gmpy2                                            \
196	                         uncertainties                                    \
197	                         #
198	
199	      # Test external imports
200	      - run: bin/test_external_imports.py
201	      - run: bin/test_submodule_imports.py
202	      - run: bin/test_executable.py
203	
204	      # Test modules with specific dependencies
205	      - run: bin/test_optional_dependencies.py
206	
207	  # -------------------- Bleeding edge dependencies ----------------- #
208	
209	  bleeding-edge:
210	    needs: [doctests-latest, tests-latest]
211	    name: Bleeding edge dependencies
212	    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
213	    steps:
214	      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
215	      - uses: actions/setup-python@a309ff8b426b58ec0e2a45f0f869d46889d02405 # v6.2.0
216	        with:
217	          python-version: '3.14'
218	      - run: pip install --upgrade pip
219	      - run: pip install git+https://github.com/mpmath/mpmath.git@master
220	      - run: |
221	          python -m pip install \
222	              --pre \
223	              --index-url https://pypi.anaconda.org/scientific-python-nightly-wheels/simple \
224	              --upgrade --only-binary=:all: \
225	                          python-flint      \
226	                          numpy             \
227	                          scipy             \
228	                          #
229	
230	      - run: pip install -r requirements-dev.txt
231	      - run: pip install .
232	      - run: pytest -Werror -n auto
233	
234	  # -------------------- FLINT tests -------------------------------- #
235	
236	  python-flint:
237	    needs: [doctests-latest, tests-latest]
238	
239	    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
240	    steps:
241	      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
242	      - uses: actions/setup-python@a309ff8b426b58ec0e2a45f0f869d46889d02405 # v6.2.0
243	        with:
244	          python-version: '3.13'
245	      - run: python -m pip install --upgrade pip
246	      - run: pip install -r requirements-dev.txt
247	      - run: pip install python-flint
248	      - run: pip install .
249	      - run: pytest -n auto
250	
251	  # -------------------- FLINT+gmpy2 ------------------------------ #
252	
253	  flint-gmpy2:
254	    needs: [doctests-latest, tests-latest]
255	
256	    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
257	    steps:
258	      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
259	      - uses: actions/setup-python@a309ff8b426b58ec0e2a45f0f869d46889d02405 # v6.2.0
260	        with:
261	          python-version: '3.14'
262	      - run: python -m pip install --upgrade pip
263	      - run: pip install -r requirements-dev.txt
264	      - run: pip install python-flint gmpy2
265	      - run: pip install .
266	      - run: pytest -n auto
267	
268	  # -------------------- Tensorflow tests -------------------------- #
269	
270	  tensorflow:
271	    needs: [doctests-latest, tests-latest]
272	
273	    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
274	    steps:
275	      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
276	      - uses: actions/setup-python@a309ff8b426b58ec0e2a45f0f869d46889d02405 # v6.2.0
277	        with:
278	          # tensorflow not yet available for 3.14
279	          python-version: '3.13'
280	      - run: python -m pip install --upgrade pip
281	      - run: pip install -r requirements-dev.txt
282	      - run: pip install numpy scipy tensorflow
283	      # Test modules that can use tensorflow
284	      - run: bin/test_tensorflow.py
285	
286	  # -------------------- PyTorch tests -------------------------- #
287	
288	  pytorch:
289	    needs: [doctests-latest, tests-latest]
290	
291	    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
292	    steps:
293	      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
294	      - uses: actions/setup-python@a309ff8b426b58ec0e2a45f0f869d46889d02405 # v6.2.0
295	        with:
296	          python-version: '3.14'
297	      - run: python -m pip install --upgrade pip
298	      - run: pip install -r requirements-dev.txt
299	      - run: pip install torch torchvision torchaudio --index-url https://download.pytorch.org/whl/cpu
300	      # Test modules that can use pytorch
301	      - run: bin/test_pytorch.py
302	
303	  # -------------------- SymEngine tests --------------------------- #
304	
305	  symengine:
306	    needs: [doctests-latest, tests-latest]
307	
308	    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
309	    steps:
310	      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
311	      - uses: actions/setup-python@a309ff8b426b58ec0e2a45f0f869d46889d02405 # v6.2.0
312	        with:
313	          python-version: '3.14'
314	      - run: python -m pip install --upgrade pip
315	      - run: pip install -r requirements-dev.txt
316	      - run: pip install numpy symengine
317	      # Test modules that can use tensorflow
318	      - run: bin/test_symengine.py
319	        env:
320	          USE_SYMENGINE: '1'
321	
322	  # ------------------------- Slow tests --------------------------- #
323	
324	  tests-slow:
325	    needs: code-quality
326	
327	    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
328	
329	    steps:
330	      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
331	      - uses: actions/setup-python@a309ff8b426b58ec0e2a45f0f869d46889d02405 # v6.2.0
332	        with:
333	          python-version: '3.13'
334	      - run: python -m pip install --upgrade pip
335	      - run: pip install -r requirements-dev.txt
336	      - run: pytest -m slow --timeout 595 -n auto -v --durations=0
337	
338	  # -------------------- Test older (and newer) Python --------------- #
339	
340	  tests-other-python:
341	    needs: [doctests-latest, tests-latest]
342	
343	    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
344	
345	    strategy:
346	      fail-fast: false
347	      matrix:
348	        python-version: ['3.10', '3.11', '3.12', '3.13', '3.14', '3.15', 'pypy-3.11']
349	        exclude:
350	          - python-version: 3.14
351	
352	    name: ${{ matrix.python-version }} Tests
353	
354	    steps:
355	      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
356	      - uses: actions/setup-python@a309ff8b426b58ec0e2a45f0f869d46889d02405 # v6.2.0
357	        with:
358	          python-version: ${{ matrix.python-version }}
359	          allow-prereleases: true
360	      - run: python -m pip install --upgrade pip
361	      - run: |
362	          if [[ "${{ matrix.python-version }}" == pypy-* ]]; then
363	            # mypy's librt dependency isn't available on PyPy, so exclude it
364	            grep -vx 'mypy' requirements-dev.txt | pip install -r /dev/stdin
365	          else
366	            pip install -r requirements-dev.txt
367	          fi
368	      - run: pytest -n auto
369	
370	  # -------------------- Doctests older (and newer) Python --------------------- #
371	
372	  doctests-other-python:
373	    needs: [doctests-latest, tests-latest]
374	
375	    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
376	
377	    strategy:
378	      fail-fast: false
379	      matrix:
380	        python-version: ['3.10', '3.11', '3.12', '3.13', '3.14', '3.15', 'pypy-3.11']
381	        exclude:
382	          - python-version: 3.14
383	
384	    name: ${{ matrix.python-version }} Doctests
385	
386	    steps:
387	      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
388	      - uses: actions/setup-python@a309ff8b426b58ec0e2a45f0f869d46889d02405 # v6.2.0
389	        with:
390	          python-version: ${{ matrix.python-version }}
391	          allow-prereleases: true
392	      - run: python -m pip install --upgrade pip
393	      - run: pip install mpmath
394	      - run: bin/doctest --force-colors
395	
396	  # -------------------- Test with mpmath master ------------------- #
397	
398	  tests-mpmath-master:
399	    needs: [doctests-latest, tests-latest]
400	
401	    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
402	
403	    name: mpmath-master Tests
404	
405	    steps:
406	      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
407	      - uses: actions/setup-python@a309ff8b426b58ec0e2a45f0f869d46889d02405 # v6.2.0
408	        with:
409	          python-version: '3.14'
410	      - run: python -m pip install --upgrade pip
411	      - run: pip install git+https://github.com/mpmath/mpmath.git@master
412	      - run: pip install -r requirements-dev.txt
413	      - run: pytest -n auto
414	
415	  # -------------------- Build the html/latex docs ----------------- #
416	
417	  sphinx:
418	    needs: code-quality
419	
420	    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
421	    steps:
422	      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
423	      - uses: actions/setup-python@a309ff8b426b58ec0e2a45f0f869d46889d02405 # v6.2.0
424	        with:
425	          python-version: '3.14'
426	      - run: doc/aptinstall.sh
427	      - run: pip install -r doc/requirements.txt
428	      - run: bin/test_sphinx.sh
429	
430	      - name: Upload built docs
431	        uses: actions/upload-artifact@bbbca2ddaa5d8feaa63e36b76fdaad77386f024f # v7.0.0
432	        with:
433	          name: sphinx-html
434	          path: doc/_build/html
435	          if-no-files-found: error
436	
437	  # -------------------- Deploy the html/latex docs ----------------- #
438	
439	  # Keep this job separate from the sphinx job that installs packages from pypi
440	  # to limit exposure to the DEPLOY_KEY secret.
441	  sphinx-deploy:
442	    needs: sphinx
443	    if: ${{ github.ref == 'refs/heads/master' }}
444	    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
445	    steps:
446	      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
447	        with:
448	          persist-credentials: false
449	
450	      - name: Download built docs
451	        uses: actions/download-artifact@3e5f45b2cfb9172054b4087a40e8e0b5a5461e7c # v8.0.1
452	        with:
453	          name: sphinx-html
454	          path: doc/_build/html
455	
456	      # When run against master, deploy to docs.sympy.org/dev. This requires
457	      # having an SSH deploy key set up. See
458	      # https://github.com/marketplace/actions/deploy-to-github-pages#using-an-ssh-deploy-key-
459	      - name: Deploy
460	        uses: JamesIves/github-pages-deploy-action@d92aa235d04922e8f08b40ce78cc5442fcfbfa2f # v4
461	        with:
462	          folder: doc/_build/html
463	          ssh-key: ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_KEY }}
464	          repository-name: sympy/sympy_doc
465	          target-folder: dev
466	
467	  # -------------------- Check the error message under py2 --------- #
468	
469	  py2-import:
470	    needs: [doctests-latest, tests-latest]
471	
472	    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
473	    steps:
474	      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
475	      - uses: actions/setup-python@a309ff8b426b58ec0e2a45f0f869d46889d02405 # v6.2.0
476	        with:
477	          python-version: 'pypy2.7'
478	      - run: bin/test_py2_import.py
479	
480	  # -------------------- Check the list of files for sdist --------- #
481	
482	  sdist-check:
483	    needs: [doctests-latest, tests-latest]
484	
485	    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
486	    steps:
487	      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
488	      - uses: actions/setup-python@a309ff8b426b58ec0e2a45f0f869d46889d02405 # v6.2.0
489	        with:
490	          python-version: '3.14'
491	      - run: python -m pip install --upgrade pip build
492	      - run: python -m build --sdist
493	      - run: release/compare_tar_against_git.py dist/*.tar.gz .
494	
495	  # -------- Run benchmarks against master and previous release ---- #
496	
497	  benchmarks:
498	    needs: [doctests-latest, tests-latest]
499	
500	    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
501	    steps:
502	      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
503	        with:
504	          # Checkout repo with full history
505	          fetch-depth: 0
506	      - uses: actions/setup-python@a309ff8b426b58ec0e2a45f0f869d46889d02405 # v6.2.0
507	        with:
508	          python-version: '3.14'
509	      - run: pip install asv virtualenv packaging
510	      - run: git submodule add https://github.com/sympy/sympy_benchmarks.git
511	
512	        # Need to make sure we can access the branches from the main repo. We
513	        # will run benchmarks for the PR, for master and for the previous
514	        # release. The version branch names below should be updated once there
515	        # has been a newer release of sympy. The list of branches to check is
516	        # also specified in asv.conf.actions.json which should be updated as
517	        # well.
518	
519	      - run: git remote add upstream https://github.com/sympy/sympy.git
520	      - run: git fetch upstream master
521	      - run: git fetch upstream 1.14
522	
523	      - name: Configure benchmarks
524	        run: asv machine --yes --config asv.conf.actions.json
525	
526	        # This is the slow part:
527	      - name: Run benchmarks
528	        run: asv run --config asv.conf.actions.json
529	
530	        # Output benchmark results
531	      - run: asv compare upstream/master HEAD --config asv.conf.actions.json --factor 1.5 | tee pr_vs_master.txt
532	      - run: asv compare upstream/master HEAD --config asv.conf.actions.json --factor 1.5 --only-changed | tee pr_vs_master_changed.txt
533	      - run: asv compare upstream/1.14 upstream/master --config asv.conf.actions.json --factor 1.5 | tee master_vs_release.txt
534	      - run: asv compare upstream/1.14 upstream/master --config asv.conf.actions.json --factor 1.5 --only-changed | tee master_vs_release_changed.txt
535	
536	        # we save all outputs as artifacts that can be downloaded from the
537	        # GitHub Actions summary page.
538	
539	      - name: Upload results as artifacts
540	        uses: actions/upload-artifact@bbbca2ddaa5d8feaa63e36b76fdaad77386f024f # v7.0.0
541	        with:
542	          name: benchmarks
543	          path: |
544	            pr_vs_master.txt
545	            pr_vs_master_changed.txt
546	            master_vs_release.txt
547	            master_vs_release_changed.txt
548

# ------------------------------------------------------------------ #
#                                                                    #
#           SymPy CI script for Github Actions                       #
#                                                                    #
#   Runs each time a pull request is opened, pushed or merged        #
#                                                                    #
# ------------------------------------------------------------------ #

name: test
on: [push, pull_request]

permissions:
  contents: read

jobs:

  # -------------------- Code quality ------------------------------ #

  code-quality:

    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2

      - uses: actions/setup-python@a309ff8b426b58ec0e2a45f0f869d46889d02405 # v6.2.0
        with:
          python-version: '3.14'
      - run: python -m pip install --upgrade pip setuptools

      - run: pip install -r requirements-dev.txt
      - name: Basic code quality tests
        run: bin/test quality

      - name: Run Ruff on the sympy package
        run: ruff check sympy

      - name: Run flake8 on the sympy package
        run: flake8 sympy

      - name: Detect invalid escapes like '\e'
        run: python -We:invalid -We::SyntaxWarning -m compileall -f -q sympy/

      - name: Test all modules are listed in setup.py
        run: bin/test_setup.py

      - run: pip install .

      - name: Check for incorrect use of ``__slots__`` using slotscheck
        run: python -m slotscheck --no-strict-imports --exclude-modules "(sympy.parsing.autolev._antlr.*|sympy.parsing.latex._antlr.*|sympy.galgebra|sympy.plotting.pygletplot.*)" sympy

      # -- temporarily disabled -- #
      # These checks were too difficult for new contributors. They will
      # need to be made easier to work with before they are reenabled.

      #- name: Test for ambiguous author information in commits
      #  run: bin/mailmap_update.py

      #- name: Make sure all commits have an associated author
      #  run: bin/authors_update.py


  # ----------------------------- mypy ----------------------------- #

  mypy:
    needs: code-quality

    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
      - uses: actions/setup-python@a309ff8b426b58ec0e2a45f0f869d46889d02405 # v6.2.0
        with:
          python-version: '3.14'
      - run: python -m pip install --upgrade pip
      - run: pip install -r requirements-dev.txt

      - name: Run mypy on the sympy package
        run: mypy sympy

  mypy-flint:
    needs: code-quality

    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
      - uses: actions/setup-python@a309ff8b426b58ec0e2a45f0f869d46889d02405 # v6.2.0
        with:
          python-version: '3.14'
      - run: python -m pip install --upgrade pip
      - run: pip install mpmath mypy hypothesis python-flint

      - name: Run mypy on the sympy package with python-flint installed
        run: mypy sympy

  # ------------------------- sphinx-lint -------------------------- #

  sphinx-lint:
    needs: code-quality

    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
      - uses: actions/setup-python@a309ff8b426b58ec0e2a45f0f869d46889d02405 # v6.2.0
        with:
          python-version: '3.14'
      - run: python -m pip install --upgrade pip
      - run: pip install -r requirements-dev.txt

      - name: Run sphinx-lint on the sympy documentation
        run: sphinx-lint doc/

  # --------------------------- check authors ---------------------- #

  authors:
    needs: code-quality
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
        with:
          # Clone full git history (needed for detecting authors)
          fetch-depth: 0
      - uses: actions/setup-python@a309ff8b426b58ec0e2a45f0f869d46889d02405 # v6.2.0
        with:
          python-version: '3.14'
      - run: python -m pip install --upgrade pip
      - run: pip install -r requirements-dev.txt
      - run: bin/mailmap_check.py

  # -------------------- Doctests latest Python -------------------- #

  doctests-latest:
    needs: code-quality

    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
      - uses: actions/setup-python@a309ff8b426b58ec0e2a45f0f869d46889d02405 # v6.2.0
        with:
          python-version: '3.14'
      - run: python -m pip install --upgrade pip
      - run: pip install -r requirements-dev.txt
      - run: bin/doctest --force-colors

  # ------------------------- Test latest Python ------------------- #

  tests-latest:
    needs: code-quality

    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    name: Tests

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
      - uses: actions/setup-python@a309ff8b426b58ec0e2a45f0f869d46889d02405 # v6.2.0
        with:
          python-version: '3.14'
      - run: python -m pip install --upgrade pip
      - run: pip install -r requirements-dev.txt
      - run: pytest -n auto

  # -------------------- Optional dependency tests ----------------- #

  optional-dependencies:
    needs: [doctests-latest, tests-latest]

    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    strategy:
      fail-fast: false
      matrix:
        python-version: ['3.10', '3.11', '3.12', '3.13', '3.14']

    name: ${{ matrix.python-version }} Optional Dendendencies

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
      - uses: actions/setup-python@a309ff8b426b58ec0e2a45f0f869d46889d02405 # v6.2.0
        with:
          python-version: ${{ matrix.python-version }}

      - run: pip install -r requirements-dev.txt

      # Install the non-Python dependencies
      - run: sudo apt-get update
      - run: sudo apt-get install antlr4 clang
      - run: python -m pip install --upgrade pip wheel setuptools

      # dependencies to install in all Python versions:
      - run: pip install numpy numexpr matplotlib bpython ipython cython  \
                         wurlitzer autowrap lxml lark z3-solver pycosat   \
                         jax jaxlib libclang scipy                        \
                         'antlr4-python3-runtime==4.11.*'                 \
                         symengine                                        \
                         numba llvmlite pymc                              \
                         gmpy2                                            \
                         uncertainties                                    \
                         #

      # Test external imports
      - run: bin/test_external_imports.py
      - run: bin/test_submodule_imports.py
      - run: bin/test_executable.py

      # Test modules with specific dependencies
      - run: bin/test_optional_dependencies.py

  # -------------------- Bleeding edge dependencies ----------------- #

  bleeding-edge:
    needs: [doctests-latest, tests-latest]
    name: Bleeding edge dependencies
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
      - uses: actions/setup-python@a309ff8b426b58ec0e2a45f0f869d46889d02405 # v6.2.0
        with:
          python-version: '3.14'
      - run: pip install --upgrade pip
      - run: pip install git+https://github.com/mpmath/mpmath.git@master
      - run: |
          python -m pip install \
              --pre \
              --index-url https://pypi.anaconda.org/scientific-python-nightly-wheels/simple \
              --upgrade --only-binary=:all: \
                          python-flint      \
                          numpy             \
                          scipy             \
                          #

      - run: pip install -r requirements-dev.txt
      - run: pip install .
      - run: pytest -Werror -n auto

  # -------------------- FLINT tests -------------------------------- #

  python-flint:
    needs: [doctests-latest, tests-latest]

    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
      - uses: actions/setup-python@a309ff8b426b58ec0e2a45f0f869d46889d02405 # v6.2.0
        with:
          python-version: '3.13'
      - run: python -m pip install --upgrade pip
      - run: pip install -r requirements-dev.txt
      - run: pip install python-flint
      - run: pip install .
      - run: pytest -n auto

  # -------------------- FLINT+gmpy2 ------------------------------ #

  flint-gmpy2:
    needs: [doctests-latest, tests-latest]

    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
      - uses: actions/setup-python@a309ff8b426b58ec0e2a45f0f869d46889d02405 # v6.2.0
        with:
          python-version: '3.14'
      - run: python -m pip install --upgrade pip
      - run: pip install -r requirements-dev.txt
      - run: pip install python-flint gmpy2
      - run: pip install .
      - run: pytest -n auto

  # -------------------- Tensorflow tests -------------------------- #

  tensorflow:
    needs: [doctests-latest, tests-latest]

    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
      - uses: actions/setup-python@a309ff8b426b58ec0e2a45f0f869d46889d02405 # v6.2.0
        with:
          # tensorflow not yet available for 3.14
          python-version: '3.13'
      - run: python -m pip install --upgrade pip
      - run: pip install -r requirements-dev.txt
      - run: pip install numpy scipy tensorflow
      # Test modules that can use tensorflow
      - run: bin/test_tensorflow.py

  # -------------------- PyTorch tests -------------------------- #

  pytorch:
    needs: [doctests-latest, tests-latest]

    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
      - uses: actions/setup-python@a309ff8b426b58ec0e2a45f0f869d46889d02405 # v6.2.0
        with:
          python-version: '3.14'
      - run: python -m pip install --upgrade pip
      - run: pip install -r requirements-dev.txt
      - run: pip install torch torchvision torchaudio --index-url https://download.pytorch.org/whl/cpu
      # Test modules that can use pytorch
      - run: bin/test_pytorch.py

  # -------------------- SymEngine tests --------------------------- #

  symengine:
    needs: [doctests-latest, tests-latest]

    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
      - uses: actions/setup-python@a309ff8b426b58ec0e2a45f0f869d46889d02405 # v6.2.0
        with:
          python-version: '3.14'
      - run: python -m pip install --upgrade pip
      - run: pip install -r requirements-dev.txt
      - run: pip install numpy symengine
      # Test modules that can use tensorflow
      - run: bin/test_symengine.py
        env:
          USE_SYMENGINE: '1'

  # ------------------------- Slow tests --------------------------- #

  tests-slow:
    needs: code-quality

    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
      - uses: actions/setup-python@a309ff8b426b58ec0e2a45f0f869d46889d02405 # v6.2.0
        with:
          python-version: '3.13'
      - run: python -m pip install --upgrade pip
      - run: pip install -r requirements-dev.txt
      - run: pytest -m slow --timeout 595 -n auto -v --durations=0

  # -------------------- Test older (and newer) Python --------------- #

  tests-other-python:
    needs: [doctests-latest, tests-latest]

    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    strategy:
      fail-fast: false
      matrix:
        python-version: ['3.10', '3.11', '3.12', '3.13', '3.14', '3.15', 'pypy-3.11']
        exclude:
          - python-version: 3.14

    name: ${{ matrix.python-version }} Tests

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
      - uses: actions/setup-python@a309ff8b426b58ec0e2a45f0f869d46889d02405 # v6.2.0
        with:
          python-version: ${{ matrix.python-version }}
          allow-prereleases: true
      - run: python -m pip install --upgrade pip
      - run: |
          if [[ "${{ matrix.python-version }}" == pypy-* ]]; then
            # mypy's librt dependency isn't available on PyPy, so exclude it
            grep -vx 'mypy' requirements-dev.txt | pip install -r /dev/stdin
          else
            pip install -r requirements-dev.txt
          fi
      - run: pytest -n auto

  # -------------------- Doctests older (and newer) Python --------------------- #

  doctests-other-python:
    needs: [doctests-latest, tests-latest]

    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    strategy:
      fail-fast: false
      matrix:
        python-version: ['3.10', '3.11', '3.12', '3.13', '3.14', '3.15', 'pypy-3.11']
        exclude:
          - python-version: 3.14

    name: ${{ matrix.python-version }} Doctests

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
      - uses: actions/setup-python@a309ff8b426b58ec0e2a45f0f869d46889d02405 # v6.2.0
        with:
          python-version: ${{ matrix.python-version }}
          allow-prereleases: true
      - run: python -m pip install --upgrade pip
      - run: pip install mpmath
      - run: bin/doctest --force-colors

  # -------------------- Test with mpmath master ------------------- #

  tests-mpmath-master:
    needs: [doctests-latest, tests-latest]

    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    name: mpmath-master Tests

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
      - uses: actions/setup-python@a309ff8b426b58ec0e2a45f0f869d46889d02405 # v6.2.0
        with:
          python-version: '3.14'
      - run: python -m pip install --upgrade pip
      - run: pip install git+https://github.com/mpmath/mpmath.git@master
      - run: pip install -r requirements-dev.txt
      - run: pytest -n auto

  # -------------------- Build the html/latex docs ----------------- #

  sphinx:
    needs: code-quality

    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
      - uses: actions/setup-python@a309ff8b426b58ec0e2a45f0f869d46889d02405 # v6.2.0
        with:
          python-version: '3.14'
      - run: doc/aptinstall.sh
      - run: pip install -r doc/requirements.txt
      - run: bin/test_sphinx.sh

      - name: Upload built docs
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@bbbca2ddaa5d8feaa63e36b76fdaad77386f024f # v7.0.0
        with:
          name: sphinx-html
          path: doc/_build/html
          if-no-files-found: error

  # -------------------- Deploy the html/latex docs ----------------- #

  # Keep this job separate from the sphinx job that installs packages from pypi
  # to limit exposure to the DEPLOY_KEY secret.
  sphinx-deploy:
    needs: sphinx
    if: ${{ github.ref == 'refs/heads/master' }}
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Download built docs
        uses: actions/download-artifact@3e5f45b2cfb9172054b4087a40e8e0b5a5461e7c # v8.0.1
        with:
          name: sphinx-html
          path: doc/_build/html

      # When run against master, deploy to docs.sympy.org/dev. This requires
      # having an SSH deploy key set up. See
      # https://github.com/marketplace/actions/deploy-to-github-pages#using-an-ssh-deploy-key-
      - name: Deploy
        uses: JamesIves/github-pages-deploy-action@d92aa235d04922e8f08b40ce78cc5442fcfbfa2f # v4
        with:
          folder: doc/_build/html
          ssh-key: ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_KEY }}
          repository-name: sympy/sympy_doc
          target-folder: dev

  # -------------------- Check the error message under py2 --------- #

  py2-import:
    needs: [doctests-latest, tests-latest]

    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
      - uses: actions/setup-python@a309ff8b426b58ec0e2a45f0f869d46889d02405 # v6.2.0
        with:
          python-version: 'pypy2.7'
      - run: bin/test_py2_import.py

  # -------------------- Check the list of files for sdist --------- #

  sdist-check:
    needs: [doctests-latest, tests-latest]

    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
      - uses: actions/setup-python@a309ff8b426b58ec0e2a45f0f869d46889d02405 # v6.2.0
        with:
          python-version: '3.14'
      - run: python -m pip install --upgrade pip build
      - run: python -m build --sdist
      - run: release/compare_tar_against_git.py dist/*.tar.gz .

  # -------- Run benchmarks against master and previous release ---- #

  benchmarks:
    needs: [doctests-latest, tests-latest]

    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
        with:
          # Checkout repo with full history
          fetch-depth: 0
      - uses: actions/setup-python@a309ff8b426b58ec0e2a45f0f869d46889d02405 # v6.2.0
        with:
          python-version: '3.14'
      - run: pip install asv virtualenv packaging
      - run: git submodule add https://github.com/sympy/sympy_benchmarks.git

        # Need to make sure we can access the branches from the main repo. We
        # will run benchmarks for the PR, for master and for the previous
        # release. The version branch names below should be updated once there
        # has been a newer release of sympy. The list of branches to check is
        # also specified in asv.conf.actions.json which should be updated as
        # well.

      - run: git remote add upstream https://github.com/sympy/sympy.git
      - run: git fetch upstream master
      - run: git fetch upstream 1.14

      - name: Configure benchmarks
        run: asv machine --yes --config asv.conf.actions.json

        # This is the slow part:
      - name: Run benchmarks
        run: asv run --config asv.conf.actions.json

        # Output benchmark results
      - run: asv compare upstream/master HEAD --config asv.conf.actions.json --factor 1.5 | tee pr_vs_master.txt
      - run: asv compare upstream/master HEAD --config asv.conf.actions.json --factor 1.5 --only-changed | tee pr_vs_master_changed.txt
      - run: asv compare upstream/1.14 upstream/master --config asv.conf.actions.json --factor 1.5 | tee master_vs_release.txt
      - run: asv compare upstream/1.14 upstream/master --config asv.conf.actions.json --factor 1.5 --only-changed | tee master_vs_release_changed.txt

        # we save all outputs as artifacts that can be downloaded from the
        # GitHub Actions summary page.

      - name: Upload results as artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@bbbca2ddaa5d8feaa63e36b76fdaad77386f024f # v7.0.0
        with:
          name: benchmarks
          path: |
            pr_vs_master.txt
            pr_vs_master_changed.txt
            master_vs_release.txt
            master_vs_release_changed.txt

FROM ubuntu:24.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    python3.12 \
    python3.12-dev \
    python3-pip \
    git \
    build-essential \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /app

COPY repo/ /app/

RUN pip install --break-system-packages -r requirements-dev.txt

COPY run.sh /run.sh
RUN chmod +x /run.sh

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]
